summary: Iteration 158: safeFetchJson Migration Testing. Verified that all 11 files have been migrated from raw .json() calls to the safeFetchJson helper. The helper at /app/frontend/src/utils/safeFetchJson.js reads response body as text first, then parses JSON manually to avoid 'body stream already read' browser error. All backend APIs return valid JSON responses. Frontend compiles with only lint warnings (no errors). Dashboard, Profile settings, Payment settings, and Appointment Wizard all load correctly.

passed_tests.backend_login_api: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns valid JSON with access_token
passed_tests.backend_timeline_api: PASS - GET /api/appointments/my-timeline returns valid JSON with action_required, upcoming, past, counts
passed_tests.backend_user_settings_api: PASS - GET /api/user-settings/me returns valid JSON with user profile data
passed_tests.backend_appointment_defaults_api: PASS - GET /api/user-settings/me/appointment-defaults returns valid JSON with platform_commission_percent
passed_tests.backend_invitation_respond_api: PASS - POST /api/invitations/{token}/respond returns valid JSON error for invalid token (404)
passed_tests.backend_charity_associations_api: PASS - GET /api/charity-associations/ returns valid JSON with associations list
passed_tests.backend_microsoft_oauth_api: PASS - GET /api/auth/microsoft/login returns valid JSON with authorization_url
passed_tests.backend_payment_method_api: PASS - GET /api/user-settings/me/payment-method returns valid JSON with has_payment_method
passed_tests.frontend_signin_page: PASS - Sign-in page loads correctly with email/password form
passed_tests.frontend_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with title 'Bonjour, Test' and create engagement button
passed_tests.frontend_profile_settings: PASS - Profile settings page loads with user data (Test Audit) and save button
passed_tests.frontend_payment_settings: PASS - Payment settings page loads with card registration option
passed_tests.frontend_appointment_wizard: PASS - Appointment wizard loads with participant form and 5-step wizard

safefetch_migration_verification.remaining_raw_json_calls: 1 in LandingPage.js (non-critical public /api/impact endpoint - not in migration scope)

critical_code_review_comments: safeFetchJson helper correctly implements text() + JSON.parse() pattern to avoid body stream already read error
All 11 files in migration scope have been updated to use safeFetchJson
Pattern: const { ok, data } = await safeFetchJson(url, options) - callers destructure ok and data instead of checking resp.ok and calling resp.json()
LandingPage.js has 1 remaining .json() call for /api/impact but this was not in the migration scope (public endpoint)
context_for_next_testing_agent: safeFetchJson migration complete. The helper at /app/frontend/src/utils/safeFetchJson.js returns { ok: boolean, status: number, data: any }. All callers destructure { ok, data } instead of checking resp.ok and calling resp.json() separately. One remaining .json() call in LandingPage.js for public /api/impact endpoint was not in migration scope.
